name: n8n-knowledge
description: Auto-recalls n8n documentation and community knowledge when working on n8n projects. Powered by a Hindsight graph memory database with 315+ pages of official n8n docs.

enableAutoRecall.title: Enable Auto-Recall
enableAutoRecall.description: Automatically recall n8n docs when n8n-related terms are detected. Disable to use manual recall only (saves tokens).

showRecallResults.title: Show Recall Results
showRecallResults.description: Show [n8n Knowledge Base] citations in responses. Set to false for silent context injection.
